name: Peanut
story: Peanut was found alone behind a café and bottle-raised by his foster. He is small, loud, and utterly convinced he is in charge of the household.
He climbs everything, naps hard, and would love another young cat to grow up with.

medical.notes: First vaccines done; neuter at six months, included in the fee.

photoAlt: Peanut, a tiny orange kitten peering down from a wooden ledge
